mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCM_DEPOSIT_REQUEST_MST ( FAMILY_ID, PUR_ITEM_SEQ, STORE_INFO, AMOUNT, REQ_DESC, REG_ID ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{purItemSeq}, #{storeInfo}, #{amount}, #{reqDesc}, #{regId} )
mapper.select: SELECT DEP_REQ_SEQ AS depReqSeq, FAMILY_ID AS familyId, PUR_ITEM_SEQ AS purItemSeq, STORE_INFO AS storeInfo, AMOUNT AS amount, REQ_DESC AS reqDesc, REQ_STATUS AS reqStatus, REG_ID AS regId, REG_DT AS regDt FROM SCM_DEPOSIT_REQUEST_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND DEP_REQ_SEQ = #{depReqSeq}
